positive: A retro vaporwave geometric composition of a stylized palm tree silhouette against a grid-lined sunset. Limited palette of electric magenta, cyan, and deep purple. Memphis design influence, vector art style, 80s nostalgia, clean lines, symmetrical.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealistic, organic, messy, grunge, messy brushstrokes
